title: Theft case at Whitefield PS
narrative: On 2024-03-22, a case of theft was reported at Whitefield PS, Bengaluru Urban district. Two-wheeler theft reported near Electronic City Phase 1. Complainant's motorcycle (KA-16-XX-7469) was stolen from parking area. The investigating team identified 2 suspect(s): Kiran Angadi, Ramesh Swamy. The modus operandi observed was: Two-wheeler chain snatching — pillion rider executes grab while rider maintains low speed. The case was registered under the relevant sections of the IPC and BNS. Investigation revealed connections to 1 prior cases in the Bengaluru Urban area. Investigation is ongoing with active surveillance on the suspects.
modus_operandi: Two-wheeler chain snatching — pillion rider executes grab while rider maintains low speed
evidence_summary: 1. FIR registered at Whitefield PS. 2. 4 witness statements collected. 3. Mobile CDR obtained. 4. Scene of crime inspected

title: Cybercrime case at Kalaburagi City PS
narrative: On 2024-11-29, a case of cybercrime was reported at Kalaburagi City PS, Kalaburagi district. OTP fraud — caller posing as bank executive obtained OTP and withdrew ₹4,78,000 from the complainant's savings account. The investigating team identified 1 suspect(s): Kavya Joshi. The modus operandi observed was: Phishing websites replicating popular e-commerce platforms. The case was registered under the relevant sections of the IPC and BNS. Investigation revealed connections to 4 prior cases in the Kalaburagi area. Investigation is ongoing with active surveillance on the suspects.
modus_operandi: Phishing websites replicating popular e-commerce platforms
evidence_summary: 1. FIR registered at Kalaburagi City PS. 2. 4 witness statements collected. 3. Mobile CDR obtained. 4. Scene of crime inspected
investigating_officer: SI Siddharth Reddy, Kalaburagi City PS

title: Theft case at Whitefield PS
narrative: On 2024-12-23, a case of theft was reported at Whitefield PS, Bengaluru Urban district. Gold chain snatching incident near Brigade Road. Suspects fled on a motorcycle towards Hebbal. The investigating team identified 3 suspect(s): Kiran Angadi, Mahesh Angadi, Ramesh Swamy. The modus operandi observed was: Distraction technique — one suspect engages victim in conversation while accomplice steals valuables. The case was registered under the relevant sections of the IPC and BNS. Investigation revealed connections to 1 prior cases in the Bengaluru Urban area. Investigation is ongoing with active surveillance on the suspects.
modus_operandi: Distraction technique — one suspect engages victim in conversation while accomplice steals valuables
evidence_summary: 1. FIR registered at Whitefield PS. 2. 4 witness statements collected. 3. CCTV footage analyzed. 4. Vehicle tracking in progress

title: Fraud case at Thirthahalli PS
